title: Mo' Advancements
description: Adds a bunch of new advancements to the game!
body:
**NOTE: This is an old buggy unfinished mod. I do not plan to update it in the future. Sorry!**

_Original description:_

Adds a bunch of new advancements to the game!

Some are easy, others reward you for completing tasks that previously did not reward you, and some are pretty random.

**_This mod will continue to update. It is currently in a VERY early state._**

I won't spoil too many so that you can experience them yourself, but a few include:

Taking More Inventory: Obtain a Shulker Box

Quite Flexible: Obtain a Netherite Block

30 Times' the Charm: Have 30 Levels at one time.

**Please report any bugs/suggestions on the Discord.**

_Made with MCreator - Go check it out!_

_Feel free to use this in your modpack! I'd prefer credit in a link to this mod page._

_I do not permit anyone to reupload this mod onto any other website without my permission. Please report any project not following this guideline._
